infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app uses the camera to capture site photographs for forms and KYC verification.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app uses your location to tag site photographs with GPS coordinates.

plugins.photosPermission: The app accesses your photos to let you upload previously taken site images.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow the app to use your location.
